title: Submit Withdrawal Request
description: Use this form to submit your withdrawal request. After submission, we will email a confirmation to the address you provide.

form.emailPlaceholder: Enter the email address for confirmation
form.itemsPlaceholder: Describe the items you wish to withdraw from
form.messagePlaceholder: Add any details that may help us process your request
form.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

alert.checkInformationDescription: Please confirm your details before submitting your withdrawal request.
alert.submitSuccessDescription: We have received your withdrawal request and sent a confirmation email.

email.customerSubject: We received your DWARFLAB withdrawal request
email.internalIntro: The customer submitted a withdrawal request through the DWARFLAB website.
email.customerIntro: We have received your withdrawal request. Our support team will review it and contact you if any additional information is needed.
email.customerReceiptNote: This email confirms receipt of your request. Please keep it for your records.
